name: model-status-worker
description: Single-Worker Cloudflare deployment inspired by WizisCool/model-status

scripts.dev:raw: node ./ensure-dev-vars.mjs && npm run build:web && wrangler dev -c wrangler.jsonc --local
scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local -c wrangler.jsonc
scripts.migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote -c wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: npm run migrate:remote && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.jsonc --keep-vars
